title: scrophularia nervosa subsp. nervosa
intro: Scrophularia nervosa subsp. nervosa, also known as Nerve Root Figwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Nerve Root Figwort include its ability to soothe anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. Nerve Root Figwort can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
